# Nandan Kumar

> Software engineer based in Bangalore, India with 10+ years of experience, building startup products and consulting for early-stage teams on product and engineering. Also known for publicly identifying a data privacy vulnerability on an airline's website in 2022, a story covered by BBC, The Hindu, and outlets worldwide.

Personal site and portfolio covering software engineering, system design, startup consulting, and personal projects (Bailoutt, Kitaaben). Also publishes free courses on system design, front-end interview prep, and Git.

## Main

- [Home](https://nandan.dev/): Bio, current work, experience, and contact info
- [Resume](https://nandan.dev/pages/Resume/Nandan.pdf): PDF resume
- [Blog](https://blog.nandan.dev/): Articles on web development, security, and system design

## Courses

- [System Design Course](https://nandan.dev/pages/courses/system-design/): Free course covering IP, OSI, DNS, load balancing, caching, databases, and real-world architecture
- [Front-end Interview Prep](https://nandan.dev/pages/courses/front-end/): JavaScript and React interview preparation
- [Git Course](https://nandan.dev/pages/courses/git/): Roadmap and command cheat sheet for everyday Git use

## Projects

- [Bailoutt](https://bailoutt.com/): AI wingman product
- [Kitaaben](https://kitaaben.com/): Book-related product
- [ASCII Canvas Editor](https://nandan.dev/ascii-canvas-editor/): Browser-based ASCII art tool

## Optional

- [Tech guides](https://nandan.dev/pages/tech/): Laptop reviews, scam awareness, LeetCode solutions
- [Lifestyle posts](https://nandan.dev/pages/lifestyle/): Travel, fitness, recipes
- [Webinars & podcasts](https://nandan.dev/pages/webinars-n-podcasts/): Talks and interviews
- [Book reviews](https://nandan.dev/pages/books/): Book club picks and reviews

For a complete listing of every page on this site with a description each, see [llms-full.txt](https://nandan.dev/llms-full.txt).
